A.label: understanding
A.summary: Meaning becomes interpretation: selective fit that can model, correct, and steer within a limit.

B.label: structure
B.summary: Meaning becomes information: a bounded form that can hold distinctions and carry record.

N.label: potential
N.summary: Meaning becomes change-pressure: the latent capacity for motion, work, or transformation.

T.label: causality
T.summary: Meaning becomes sequence: a relation between states rather than a frozen thing.

X.label: unity
X.summary: Meaning begins as the bare distinction that lets something be this instead of not-this.

dominant_meaning_form.label: identity
dominant_meaning_form.summary: Existence bounded by a limit becomes this rather than that: an identifiable thing with a skin.
